why: Dogfood miss from PR #102 / issue #111: WebhookControllerTest stubbed reviewDispatcher.dispatch(...) to throw RuntimeException("executor saturated"), but the real ReviewDispatcher.dispatch() catches RejectedExecutionException internally and returns false — it never throws to its caller. The green test made a broken rollback path look proven. With both the mock and the real method in the provided material, the review prompt must surface the unfaithful stub.
prTitle: fix(webhook): roll back dedup slot when dispatch fails (#89)
prDescription:
- [x] 🐛 Bug fix

Fixes #89

Adds forget(deliveryId) when routeEvent catches a RuntimeException from a saturated review executor.
